name: Arni Souvlaki
recipeIngredient: 1 Leg of lamb; about 4 lb., boned
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the lamb into 1 1/2 inch cubes and place in a non-reactive (glass or earthenware) dish.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the lamb, mix well to coat the meat, and cover. Alternatively, place all ingredients in a heavy plastic bag and seal.
3. Marinate in the refrigerator for 12-24 hours, stirring the meat occasionally.
4. Remove the lamb from the marinade and thread onto metal skewers. Bay leaf pieces may be placed between lamb cubes.
5. Skewer peppers, onions, etc., separately if desired, and serve with the lamb.
6. If marinating vegetables, cook under a hot broiler or over glowing charcoal, turning and basting frequently with marinade. Aim for medium rare.
7. Check the meat often, as cooking times will vary due to the variability of charcoal fires.
8. Place on a platter and garnish with parsley and lemon wedges. Serves 6-8.
